caption: A presenter stands beside a large projection screen at a conference. The man is dressed in a dark blazer over a light-colored shirt. In the initial frames, a slide is partially visible, featuring a photograph of a historic building and the text "europython", "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING", "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW", "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018", and "Alejandro Saucedo". Various corporate logos, including those for Intel Software, Microsoft, and Python, are displayed along the bottom. As the sequence progresses, the slide changes to a darker background, maintaining the title "INDUSTRIAL MACHINE LEARNING" and "HORIZONTALLY SCALABLE DATA PIPELINES WITH AIRFLOW", while adding the presenter's social media handles, "@AxSaucedo" and "in/axsaucedo". The man remains in a similar position, gesturing while speaking to an unseen audience. The bottom of the screen consistently displays "europython" and "Edinburgh 23-29 July 2018".
